events.description: On January 12, 2009, Satoshi Nakamoto sent 10 BTC to Hal Finney in Bitcoin's first recorded peer-to-peer transaction, proving the network worked beyond mining rewards.
events.title: From Satoshi to Hal

events.description: This transaction is associated with the famous Bitcoin Pizza Day purchase in which Laszlo Hanyecz spent 10,000 BTC for two pizzas on May 22, 2010.
events.title: Pizza Purchase
